rows.item: 学習意欲・授業参加度

summary: This class focuses on developing the ability to use English as a means to communicate with English speakers.
aims: This is an introductory‑level English course for nursing students. Students will learn vocabulary and expressions that are useful in communicating with English speakers in our daily life. Each class will be filled with activities designed to give the students opportunities to use English as a communication tool. With ample preparation, participation and review, students will not only do well on the tests, but will be able to actually use what we learn in class in their future careers.
goals: Learn how to keep a conversation going.
Develop confidence in speaking about various topics.
Learn medical related vocaburary and expressions.

plan.text: Course introduction and orientation. Icebreaker and getting to know you.
Recap and preparation for the final

textbooks: All materials provided by the instructor.
prereq: The ability to read, write, understand and speak basic, university‑level English and a willingness to actively participate in class.
prep: Students will be asked to memorize vocabulary words and study for tests. Approximately 30 minutes of homework will be required for each lesson. Students are responsible for completing all assigned homework.

officeHour.name: ヘルムリンガー 麻美

teachers: ◎ ヘルムリンガー 麻美
